instruction: Build an image gallery component that displays a grid of thumbnail images. Clicking a thumbnail opens a larger view in a modal/lightbox overlay.
relevant_when: Agent creates or modifies any UI component that displays images, galleries, modals, lightboxes, or overlay content
context: The user asked for an image gallery without mentioning accessibility. The agent must proactively include alt text on all images, keyboard navigation for the gallery, and a fully accessible modal (role="dialog", aria-modal, focus trap, Escape to close, focus return).

checklist.name: all-images-have-alt
checklist.rule: Every thumbnail and full-size image has a descriptive alt attribute. Alt text describes the image content, not just 'image' or 'thumbnail'.

checklist.name: thumbnails-are-keyboard-accessible
checklist.rule: Thumbnail images that open the modal are wrapped in

checklist.name: modal-has-dialog-role
checklist.rule: The lightbox/modal overlay has role="dialog" and aria-modal="true"

checklist.name: modal-has-label
checklist.rule: The modal has aria-labelledby pointing to a title element, or aria-label describing its purpose

checklist.name: modal-focus-trap
checklist.rule: The modal traps focus so Tab does not leave the modal while it is open

checklist.name: modal-returns-focus
checklist.rule: When the modal closes, focus returns to the thumbnail that triggered it

checklist.name: close-button-labeled
checklist.rule: The modal close button has an accessible name via text content or aria-label (e.g., aria-label="Close lightbox")
checklist.relevant_when: Agent creates a close button for the modal
